title: Where can I see how many and which boards a user is subscribed to on Monday.com?
excerpt: Where can I see how many and which boards a user is subscribed to on Monday.com? Previously, I could click on the user and see this information, but it seems this view has been replaced by a listing of groups the user be…

posts.author: beabrito (Beatriz Brito Corrêa de Medeiros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Where can I see how many and which boards a user is subscribed to on Monday.com? Previously, I could click on the user and see this information, but it seems this view has been replaced by a listing of groups the user belongs to.

It was so useful… is there another way to check this?
